page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A read visualizer for structural variants
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Visualizes high-throughput sequencing data relevant to a structural variant. Only reads supporting the variant or the reference allele will be shown.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Visualizes high-throughput sequencing data relevant to a structural variant. Only reads supporting the variant or the reference allele will be shown.
